reviews.review_description: I really enjoy playing these types of games and this one is great with really nice graphics even on the quest 2 which is what I'm playing on. I'm glad they added support for the quest 2. I want to give it 5 stars but I unfortunately have found a bug that glitches me through the floor every time i go through the clean door transitioning from day 11 to 12. Although the graphics look great i notice a black box floating in front of me in the small hall that transitions to the next day. If also possible for a slight increase in the resolution as I almost missed the picture where the faces change cause it was little blurry. I hope these issues can be fixed as I very much am enjoying the game and look forward to future updates

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! The resolution was bumped to 1.25RS on 1.05, and I just pushed a fix to the dreaded day 11 to 12 bug.

reviews.review_description:
Update:

The floor glitch was patched a few days ago so my rating is back up to a full five stars. 🙂

--

Finally a horror game with Quest 3 graphics! Beautifully detailed environments. Great art direction. This is well worth the asking price. I hope the developers make a lengthy horror adventure someday.

I haven't finished it yet, but I'm really enjoying the suspense. This along with Affected: The Manor will be a yearly Halloween treat.

I can't stress enough how good this game looks in the headset, not just from a technical standpoint, but artistically as well.

I had to knock off a star for a game ending glitch I ran into just now. On one run after I stepped into the hallway the game glitched and I feel through the floor into an endless free fall.

Game is seriously cool graphics are off the chart fantastic and as good as red matter 2 ghosttown titanic a space between and a few others. Hopefully they will expand this game best played by going real slow there is some serious eyecandy with the textures shading lighting why at the beginning u can see moisture and water on the floor looks so real .

reviews.review_title: Groundhog Day except you sh*t your pants
reviews.review_description:
Exceptional in it's simplicity and execution.
However, it cannot be completed as there is a glitch after day 11. If it's deliberate, it isn't satisfactory and it crashes anyway. 
Shame to go to all the effort with such a disappointing conclusion. 

Concept 9/10
Graphics 10/10
Controls 5/10
Atmosphere 9/10
Replay Value 4/10
Value for Money 9/10
Soiled Underwear 10/10

developer_response.body: I'm glad you enjoyed the game and so sorry for that bug! It is fixed now.

reviews.review_description:
This game looks the part and is a perfect pick up and scare your friends type of experience. You slowly walk and have to look for changes in your enviroment. And have to choose the right door or else... 😅 its a looping type of vr game that really gives you a very resident evil 7 style vibe or Silent hill hallway.

Visuals are great. 
If i could wish for one thing it would be an element of interaction I get that we aren't supposed to open or interact with anything here. But a lighter or a flashlight maybe could've been a cool twist if the flat suddenly turned pitch black for one of the walk throughs. I get that the light is baked and all so that's a big ask I get it. 

Overall, a very affordable way to get scared and get people scared double as a immensely impressive showcase of what the Quest 3 can pull off.

Great work,
Best regards
Poly Truck - DEV

Fun game Love the graphics need more jump-scares entity jump-scares pretty good something like blood coming out the walls hands reaching out trying to grab you in the hallway maybe a scary clown climbing through that window and the other room before you reach the two doors that'd be creepy something jumping out of that closet with the spoon on it and that's all I haven't as soon as it's going to happen I just haven't seen it maybe a monster coming out of blood out the sink and dematic clown chases you roaches everywhere keep up the good work guys I love this it's pretty good it jumped me a couple of times please add more jump scares that will make it more terrifying more creepier creatures I love this game is fun it's pretty good it's pretty good jump me a couple times keep up the good work can you please add more monsters and jump-scares maybe a creepy demonic twisted mutilated centipede crawling around I had this lady chasing you through the house something reaching out into that window to try to grab you little evil nips trying to kill you or popping out the cabinet trying to do stab gestures like they trying to stab you and spit blood in your face some creepy like a demonic clown popping out through that window make you jump and pee your pants to better to jump scares and the better the game Love the graphics best graphics as seen in the game please add more keep up the good work

Lets start with something good. The graphics for this game are really nice. But when you only make one loop of a house you better have good graphics. The sound is good as well. However there is absolutely NO interaction with this game at all. Why give me hands if they cant DO anything. So now you are just walking in a circle looking at stuff so you can pick one of 2 doors at the end of the hallway. LAME!  Very predictable jump scares are sprinkled in. If you have EVER played a vr horror game this one will not be scary for you at all. The lighting sucks! So tired of games that you can barely see things in. The ONLY saving grace for this game is its price. For $5 you cant complain too much. But i need more than just walking around in circles to give this game a better rating.

specially for the price, but some effects and shadows are broken after last update. Performance could be better too, and hands pose a little more natural.

Anyway is a good game with some pretty well-done, unsettling moments.
I'm not able to finish the game. After the 12 day your character fell endless. Please fix this bug.

developer_response.body: Hey there! So sorry for the bug, it is now fixed.

reviews.review_description:
I was so looking forward to this! I admit I didn’t expect much for five bucks but, I’m a tad disappointed. It’s a loop of ONE ROOM AND HALLWAY, and while it LOOKS gorgeous and there’s some truly spooky moments, I beat it in well under an hour. It gets really easy to tell which door to go through. 
I was hoping for some interaction, and maybe some other areas to explore that keep changing. Also, can’t change the turn style to smooth, and the character walks abysmally slow. 
It’s a neat short experience though, fun to maybe have friends play to scare them. I just wanted a LITTLE more.i gave it three stars for the beautiful graphics and a few good scares.

if you like horror and anomaly games you will love this game. i haven't beat the game yet i got to day 10 but its really good. might not be for everybody, but if you like horror games and anomaly games i think you'll really like this. graphics are really good and in my opinion the whole game is spooky brilliant, five stars for me.😱😱😱😱😱

Don’t know if it can get better than this on quest, it’s a small game so the textures can actually look nice

Great scares especially for an anomaly based game, can’t say much else because it is pretty short but I mean first run I did I didn’t even see all the scares so who knows man

Any complaint about it being like too short I’d just ignore, only 5 bones for the game and it’s not like it’s unplayable or not as scary after one go

This game is awesome and absolutely terrifying! Amazing graphics, and jump scares. Super simple, definitely recommend. 
I’m surprised it doesn’t have more reviews!￼￼
Is a shame that developer has not added smooth turn rotation, this could of been a pretty and cool game. If smooth turn is ever added Ill give a better review.
I haven’t played too far Inot the game yet but I was extremely impressed by the visuals this game had to offer. Incredibly talented developer! Good work y’all!

reviews.review_title: Tension and horror never looked so good
reviews.review_description: WOW this game is terrifyingly pretty. Some of the best graphics on Quest, in VR period. Makes the tension and creepy loops all the more scary as you twitch and jump at every anomaly. 10/10 would recommend to anyone who’s constipated and needs some help absolutely $hi##ing themselves.

Firstly I picked this up in the 30% off sale and it sure is a steal at the price, made it to day 9 and have really jumped and screamed a lot.
Tension is real as you go through the house.
Oh dear as another person has said I made it to day 12 and fell through the floor 
He reported this 4 weeks ago, so disappointed the devs have not fixed this, so will have to refund.

developer_response.body: So sorry about that bug! It's fixed now.

reviews.review_description: Genuinely the most beautiful moody graphics on Quest!
It's good, but I wish the lighting was brighter because all I can see is darkness.
It's like Exit 8 but, somehow worse.
High quality game that is cheap. Decent jump scares. Decent graphics.
